title: Cheer Boys Cheer
writer: Ian Dalrymple, Donald Bull, Allan MacKinnon
actors: Nova Pilbeam, Edmund Gwenn, Jimmy O'Dea
plot: Set in the world of brewing, a classic tale (an Ealing speciality) of the small, friendly, family run company being threatened with closure by the nasty, modern, large organisation. Bringing in familiar farce elements such as mist...
